subject: A humanoid figure is dragged through a stone alley by two large dogs straining at their leashes
description: A humanoid figure wearing a bright green jacket and orange vest stumbles forward through a narrow stone alley, pulled by two large, powerful dogs on leashes. The dogs strain ahead with teeth bared — one looking back toward the viewer, one lunging forward. The figure's arm is stretched out, unable to resist the animals' momentum. The alley is flanked by high stone walls, with an arched gate visible in the background opening onto a view of distant buildings. The palette is subdued urban stone grays contrasted against the vivid green and orange of the walker's clothing. The tone is comedic chaos.
foreground: humanoid being dragged by two large dogs on leashes through a stone alley
background: narrow stone alley with arched gate, distant buildings
emotion: frantic loss of control — figure wide-eyed and off-balance
